channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter on Lordship Lane, 3rd March
item.description:
Litter on pavement- bag should be in green bin. Please remove and check for addresses. 132 Lordship

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
Dog poo on pavement outside number 18 Durban road by tree base. Thanks for sorting it’s on lots of people’s walk to school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Around 10 black bin bags dumped at the start of the dirt path on the grass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thanet Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Bags, 3rd March
item.description:
2 black sacks dumped at entrance to Waverley Close. Please can this be cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waverley Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bumper of car dumped in Wyvil road, 3rd March
item.description:
Bumper of car dumped in Wyvil road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyvil Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on corner of Regan way, 3rd March
item.description:
Someone dumped a bunch of rubbish last night. This happens every few weeks. Cameras would help prevent this from being an ongoing issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped mattress and bed, 3rd March
item.description:
Been there 1 week

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southwark cleaning bags, 3rd March
item.description:
Southwark Council cleaning bags next to cycle hanger at the corner of Sutherland Square and Sutherland Walk SE17

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Square, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seriously eroded tarmac pavements, 3rd March
item.description:
The pavements outside number 79 and 82 are in a very bad state. This is a high traffic pedestrian area due to the access via the footpath to Bursted Wood School. A lot of children and elderly use these pavements daily and they are in serious need of repair. If nothing is done someone will hurt themselves.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dog fouling, 3rd March
item.description:
Dog fouling on the street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and broken slabs, 3rd March
item.description:
Broken, raised and marked slabs outside my house (7 Westbrooke Road) since Thames Water undertook water repairs into the road. Many elderly residents and young children live on this street and it’s only a matter of time until someone trips up. It’s also an eye sore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Westbrooke Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the floor needs picking up, 3rd March
item.description:
Bin bag on the floor needs picking up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basingdon Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping including wide screen TV by a tree, 3rd March
item.description:
Wide in screen toys and other household rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norcott Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags not collected, 3rd March
item.description:
The black refuse bags were not collected yesterday in Hillside Grove. I live at no. 4 but noticed it was not just mine, but all the houses who use bags.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hillside Grove, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole, 3rd March
item.description:
At the junction of Southend Lane and Allerford Road there is a long in length pothole in the box junction area that needs attending to
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Lane, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped lime bike by my neighbour, 3rd March
item.description:
This bike has sat in my neighbours garden for a about year I’ve been telling her to remove it as it was in the front garden right in front of my window and now she has moved it to the street! Great!! Now fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Culver Avenue, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two mattresses, 3rd March
item.description:
Two mattresses blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conifer Gardens, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Fly tipping in 106 Blackheath Road close to Wickes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag exploded, 3rd March
item.description:
A fox may have got into n of the recycling bags and pulled rubbish all over the road which the Ben was able to clean up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Geldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak, 3rd March
item.description:
This water leak has been here for over two weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fen Lane
Report on FixMyStreet
